name: RPlog_Tal_sin_the_Knight
title: Recruiting the Knights of Corellia
summary: At a Tatooine spaceport, the robed Vaughan, formerly known as Cade and once an Imperial agent, gathers two prospective recruits aboard his ship the Digit's Bane: the mercenary Tathleach and the green Twi'lek Tal'sin, who has recently parted ways with the New Republic. After cautious introductions, Vaughan ushers them inside and asks each to share his view of the galaxy's state, drawing agreement that both the Empire and the Republic have failed the people. Vaughan recounts his own disillusionment serving the Empire and pitches his organization's goal: to carve an independent path that forces both sides to listen and offers ordinary people another option besides dying for someone else's cause. He invites both men to serve as his ground commanders, and after Tathleach and Tal'sin each accept with rough humor, Vaughan welcomes them to the Knights of Corellia and the three seal the pact before heading off for a drink to discuss logistics.
